translated: There are wings on the heels of the shoes.
Isn't that amazing?
The attention to detail is just...
I can really feel the dedication.
The designs are slightly different for each member,
so I can't help but stare at them.
Wait, seriously...
That was Episode 7 just now. Look at what happens after.
This is when everyone watched the Grand Fleur commercial together,
and then this expression.
Airi's look here is just... I love this vibe.
Isn't she cute?
Minori, seriously, thank you.
And then, there's that.
It's Momo House.
This is the first time I've seen Momo House from this angle.
This illustration...
So that's what it looked like!
It's so heartwarming. It's Momo House.
Moving on... MIKU.
You can feel such a strong sense of will
from this MIKU.
It's so good.
MIKU...
She shows so many different expressions depending on her resolve,
and it's like she's carrying Shizuku's determination right along with her.
